text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Ines! I've been prepping for
today, so you just go back to the dorm and get
ready to party!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We've got snacks, cake, and even... something
that starts with a P!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (Ryan, you didn't, did you? Anything but that!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I got you a present for your birthday!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(...Thank goodness! I was afraid she was going to
say protein powder!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's a set of all my favorite strength training
equipment! Let's feel the burn together!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I knew it! I bet she has some protein powder
stashed away somewhere too!)
